snippet.title: Our Ultra High-Speed Motor
snippet.description: Blendtec blenders feature the industry's most powerful motors, providing the same commercial strength and quality you'd find in your favorite smoothie shop or restaurant. Our motors can blend even the toughest ingredients, like ice, frozen fruit, and raw veggies, to a perfectly smooth consistency without skipping a beat.

snippet.title: Our Durable Safety Blade
snippet.description: Blendtec blades are made of cold-forged hardened steel and are up to 80% thicker and 10 times stronger than other blender blades. They're also blunt instead of sharp. Why? With a blade that spins over 300 miles per hour, it doesn't need to be sharp to get the job done. Instead of chipping away at ice and frozen fruit with sharp edges, the large, blunt design pulverizes virtually anything. And it’s completely safe to clean, too.

snippet.title: Our Simple Touch Interface
snippet.description: Blendtec blenders feature modern touch controls that not only look great, but make everything from blending to cleanup easier than ever. No more baby-sitting your blender–create the perfect blends every time with a single touch. The sleek, flat design is also easy to clean.

snippet.title: Will it Blend? Hillary Clinton's Emails
snippet.description:
Blendtec founder and CEO, Tom Dickson, visits the set of Bloomberg's "With All Due Respect"and takes on the U.S. political scene and asks the important question..."Will it Blend?" Watch Tom pulverize Hillary's Blackberry and emails faster than Hillary already did. Also watch Tom blend President Barack Obama's golf club, Senator and Republican 2016 Presidential hopeful Ted Cruz's Canadian identity, and Speaker of the House John Boehner's suntan lotion (that he never uses). Why did we do this? Because pulverizing politics can be quite a rush! 

Many thanks to Bloomberg's "With All Due Respect" hosts Mark Halperin and John Heilemann and the folks at Bloomberg who are big "Will it Blend" fans! We love you guys! 

Check out the Bloomberg write-up and segment here: http://bloom.bg/1ankCvQ 

Shop our amazing lineup of blenders at http://www.Blendtec.com

Subscribe and see what Tom will blend next!
Let us know what Tom should blend next here: https://www.facebook.com/willitblend

snippet.title: Will it Blend? How to Properly Deflate a Football
snippet.description:
What do a deflated football, pretty-boy doll and a mouth guard have to do with the Big Game?  Think quarterback Tom Brady, deflate-gate and cornerback Richard Sherman! Blendtec received a visit by the local CBS affiliate (KUTV2) and reporter Brooke Graham. This is behind the scenes footage of Tom Dickson blending some items for the Big Game on Sunday as well as how to properly "deflate" a football! Watch for yourself and enjoy this "unofficial" Will it Blend? episode. 

Want to see Tom blend more stuff? Subscribe now! 

Leave us a comment and let us know what Tom should blend next! 

Shop our amazing lineup of blenders at http://www.Blendtec.com

Big thanks to KUTV 2's The Refresh and Brooke!

snippet.title: Blendtec vs NHL
snippet.description:
New Video Series: Blendtec VS.....
The Blendtec blender decides who will win the 2014 NHL Finals, the New York Rangers or the LA Kings? We used a Phantom camera to slow the 300mph blade down so we could see the slow-mo action. This entire video was only 3 seconds of blending time and then extended with the slow motion views. Each hit to the Goalie equals a goal but does the winner really win?
